reasoning: Leya Garifullina's published rating for October is 2453. Meeting the >1% condition requires her rating to be at least 2478, which is just above her all-time peak of 2477 set in August 2025. While she played a high volume of matches in October (Serbian Team Championship and European Club Cup) and took board 2 silver at the ECCC, she suffered at least one loss to Divya Deshmukh. Gaining ~25 points in a single month with a K-factor of 10 requires an enormous score differential (+2.5 expected score), which is very hard with a recorded loss. Therefore, reaching 2478 on the November FIDE list (applying to Nov 2 and Nov 25) is unlikely. However, given her rapid improvement trajectory over 2024-2025 (+64 points prior to her slight drop), she has a realistic chance of bouncing back above her peak by January 2026.
